rawAssistant: The forest can be treacherous, especially with the recent rain and mist still lingering in the air. I'd recommend keeping your wits about you and watching for any signs of trouble. We did have some reports of shadowy creatures lurking near Hollowfen, but it's possible they've settled down since last night. Still, better safe than sorry – perhaps we can take a closer look at those road signs together?
